title: Nigel Nivers

{{Quote|Attention, citizens! I am ''Grand Moff Nivers.'' This planet is now under control of ''the Empire!'' You will work for the Empire… or you will ''suffer!''<nowiki></nowiki>|Nivers addresses the citizens of Tandankin|<ref name="SBS" />}}
[[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] '''Nigel Nivers''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In the [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] after the defeat at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Nivers became one of many Imperial [[Warlord/Legends|warlords]] vying for power, controlling a region of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. He moved to subjugate the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tandankin]], a world within his domain, and conscript its population as workers, but his efforts were thwarted by the members of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]. Nivers's brief occupation of Tandankin collapsed when the Grand [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] was detained by the New Republic.

==Biography==
{{Quote|We've captured Grand Moff Nivers and rounded up the Imperials…|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], to [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]|<ref name="SBS" />}}
Nigel Nivers was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], a significant [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] victory in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]],<ref name="SBS" /> Nivers became a [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]], just as several other [[Imperial officer/Legends|officers]] had in the wake of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Death/Legends|death]].<ref name="Despoilers2">{{SW|url=news/the-imperial-warlords-despoilers-of-an-empire-part-2|series=The Imperial Warlords: Despoilers of an Empire|text=Part 2|nolive=1}}</ref> A few [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] after [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], Nivers moved to take control of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tandankin]],<ref name="SBS" /> an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] world<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> located in the region of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] under his authority.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|384|Nivers, Grand Moff}}</ref> After claiming the world in the name of the Empire, he announced to Tandankin's citizens that they would either serve him as workers or face severe consequences.<ref name="SBS" />

His speech was cut short, however, when the [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighters]]<ref name="SBS" /> of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]'s<ref name="Despoilers2" /> [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] suddenly appeared in the skies above Tandankin and [[Battle of Tandankin|opened fire]] on Nivers's forces, much to the excitement of the planet's beleaguered populace. After a relatively short engagement, which saw the destruction of the Grand [[Moff/Legends|Moff's]] force of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] before they could even deploy, the Rebels managed to capture Nivers and the remaining Imperials.<ref name="SBS" /> The Grand Moff's short-lived occupation of the planet, less than a day old, was brought to an end.<ref name="CSWE" /> Nivers's rival, [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]], absorbed what was left of the Grand Moff's territory into his own [[Zsinj's Empire|domain]],<ref name="Despoilers1">{{SW|url=news/the-imperial-warlords-despoilers-of-an-empire-part-1|series=The Imperial Warlords: Despoilers of an Empire|text=Part 1|nolive=1}}</ref> while many of Nivers's followers eventually joined up with the [[Restored Empire|forces]] of self-proclaimed [[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] [[Ennix Devian]] in the [[Spawn Nebula/Legends|Spawn Nebula]].<ref name="Despoilers2" />

==Personality and traits==
A [[Color/Legends|white]]-[[Hair/Legends|haired]] Grand Moff of the Empire<ref name="SBS" /> who became a warlord after the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor's]] death,<ref name="Despoilers2" /> Nivers controlled an area of space that included Tandankin.<ref name="CSWE" /> When he moved to impose authority over the population of the world, Nivers declared that the citizens would either work for the Imperial regime or suffer under it.<ref name="SBS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Grand Moff Nivers appeared in the ''[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron Special]]'', a [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] written by [[Ryder Windham]] that was originally released in [[1996]] as part of an [[Wikipedia:Apple Jacks|Apple Jacks]] promotion by the [[Wikipedia:Kellogg Company|Kellogg Company]].<ref name="SBS" /> His first name was revealed in the [[Star Wars Blog]] article "[[The Imperial Warlords: Despoilers of an Empire]]."<ref name="Despoilers1" />

Nivers was briefly mentioned in the original version of the [[Star Wars Insider 66|''Star Wars Insider'' 66]] article ''[[Who's Who: Imperial Grand Admirals]]'', titled ''[[Dirty Dozen: The Imperial Grand Admirals]]'' and slated for inclusion in an issue of the ''[[Star Wars Gamer]]'' magazine.<ref name="cut">"[[Dirty Dozen: The Imperial Grand Admirals]]"</ref><ref name="Blog">{{Blog|danwallace|16|Grand Admirals: What Have They Got in their Pocketsses?}}</ref> In ''Dirty Dozen'', Nivers was noted as being one of the "worthy adversaries" whom [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Rufaan Tigellinus]] saw among the Grand Moffs.<ref name="cut" /> The reference was cut by the time ''Who's Who'' was released in [[2003]].<ref name="Who's Who">{{InsiderCite|66|Who's Who: Imperial Grand Admirals}}</ref>
